# Serin Labs

> Open-source ESP32 controller that adds local, cloud-free smart control to Mitsubishi Electric mini-split heat pumps through the CN105 serial port. Flash it with ESPHome (for Home Assistant) or HomeKit-compatible firmware (for Apple Home) — no cloud account, app, or subscription required. Available as a DIY parts list or a pre-assembled controller.

## Docs

- [What You Need (Parts)](https://serin-labs.com/parts.html): ESP32 board (M5Stack NanoC6 or Atom S3 Lite) plus the CN105-to-Grove cable.
- [Check Your Model](https://serin-labs.com/compatibility.html): Instant compatibility checker — type a Mitsubishi model number for a verdict, or deep-link a result with ?model=MSZ-GL06NA. Covers wall-mount, floor, cassette, ducted, P-series, and rebranded Trane/American Standard units, plus full series tables and how to find the CN105 port.
- [Flash Firmware](https://serin-labs.com/flash.html): Browser-based ESP32 flasher over USB — ESPHome or HomeKit, no software install.
- [ESPHome Setup](https://serin-labs.com/esphome/setup.html): Connect the controller to Home Assistant.
- [ESPHome YAML Generator](https://serin-labs.com/esphome/generate-yaml.html): Build a ready-to-use ESPHome config for your board and sensors.
- [HomeKit Setup](https://serin-labs.com/homekit/setup.html): Add the controller to Apple Home and Siri.
- [HomeKit Firmware Features](https://serin-labs.com/homekit/features.html): Native HAP pairing, built-in web UI, Siri control.
- [Wiring Reference](https://serin-labs.com/wiring.html): CN105-to-Grove pinout and cable assembly.
- [Troubleshooting](https://serin-labs.com/troubleshooting.html): Flashing, WiFi, and CN105 communication fixes.
- [FAQ](https://serin-labs.com/faq.html): Short answers on compatibility, what's included, flashing, HomeKit vs ESPHome, orders, and returns.

## Store

- [Serin Controller (Etsy)](https://serinlabs.etsy.com/): Pre-assembled controller with the CN105-to-Grove cable included.
- [CN105-to-Grove Cable (Etsy)](https://serinlabs.etsy.com/): Ready-made cable, no crimping or soldering.

## Company

- [About](https://serin-labs.com/about.html): One-person shop in New Jersey; what Serin Labs adds on top of the open-source CN105 community projects.
- [Contact](https://serin-labs.com/contact.html): Contact form, plus GitHub for technical questions and Etsy messages for orders.
- [Store Policies](https://serin-labs.com/policies.html): Free US shipping from NJ, 1–2 day processing, 30-day returns, 12-hour cancellations, DOA replacement.
- [Privacy](https://serin-labs.com/privacy.html): Self-hosted cookie-free analytics, contact-form data handling, Etsy handles payments.

## Source & Community

- [Serin Labs on GitHub](https://github.com/Serin-Labs)
- [Discussions](https://github.com/Serin-Labs/serin-cn105/discussions)
- [Licenses & Compliance](https://serin-labs.com/licenses.html): Built on echavet/MitsubishiCN105ESPHome, Espressif esp-homekit-sdk, and SwiCago/HeatPump; also covers FCC certification details for the M5Stack boards, safety and installation notes, and trademark disclosures.

## Notes

- Independent open-source project — not developed, endorsed, or certified by Apple Inc. or Mitsubishi Electric Corporation.
- One controller is required per indoor unit; each indoor head has its own CN105 port.
- Mitsubishi Heavy Industries (SRK/SRC/SRF) and Ecodan air-to-water units are NOT compatible.
